message:
feat(mvcc,pager): expand MVCC core types for cell-level visibility and pager transaction refinements

MVCC core types (+136 lines):
- Expand core_types module with additional data structures for cell-level
  MVCC visibility tracking, supporting the cell-granularity version system
  that allows concurrent writers to operate on different rows within the
  same B-tree page

Pager (+106 lines):
- Refine transaction handling with improved WAL sync policy paths and
  read-only pager integration adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
